business.name: Manny's Handyman Works LLC
business.tagline: Your go-to handyman for reliable home repairs and improvements

hero.headline: The Fix-It Guy *Richmond Calls First*
hero.subheadline: From leaky toilets to laminate floors — one call handles it all.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every Project, Done Right
services_section.subheading: From quick repairs to full room makeovers

services.title: Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Toilet fixes, leak repairs, and faucet installations. No job too small.

services.title: Electrical Work
services.description: Light fixture replacements, outlet installations, and electrical troubleshooting.

services.title: Flooring Installation
services.description: Laminate, vinyl, and hardwood flooring professionally installed.

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Walls, ceilings, and trim painting with clean, professional results.

services.title: Door & Window Service
services.description: Door seal replacement, draft fixes, and window installations.

services.title: General Repairs
services.description: Bed frame tightening, blind installation, mailbox replacement, and more.

about.heading: Real Work, Real Results
about.body: We're Richmond handymen who show up when we say we will. Clear communication, upfront pricing, no surprises.

reviews.name: Du'Neika E.
reviews.text: Manny replaced my door seal and fixed the draft perfectly. Communication was seamless — I knew when to expect him and the cost estimate. He explained everything clearly.

reviews.name: Deb W.
reviews.text: If I could give 10 stars, I would! Excellent customer service and accommodated a same-day repair. His team is amazing too!

reviews.name: Sion !.
reviews.text: Incredible work on multiple services — toilet repair, light fixtures, painting, laminate flooring, and more. All completed professionally.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Richmond & Beyond
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across the metro area

cta.heading: Ready to Get It Fixed?
cta.body: Free estimates, upfront pricing, and the work gets done right the first time.
